title: Habitat Studio Run Runtime Authority Closure
forbids: Run in Game runtime packet closure while structural authority rows SA-01 through SA-13 are missing, non-green, or obscured by unresolved packet-local temporary rules
why: Packet 14 closes the runtime/materialization packet train by verifying the already-registered authority rows as the durable topology guardrail set. This command check coordinates Habitat-owned rule outputs; it does not create a second authority tree.
remediate: Register and fix the owning SA-01 through SA-13 Habitat rules, remove or promote packet-local temporary rules, then rerun this closure check.
message: Studio Run in Game runtime authority closure is incomplete.
